display.purpose: Full-viewport experiment titles with tight leading.

label.purpose: Navigation, stage numbers, and rare technical kickers.

shadows.name: gift-float
shadows.purpose: Grounds the complete Gift Box above its stage.

shadows.name: lifted-lid
shadows.purpose: Clarifies separation after the lid opens.

motion.name: navigation-state
motion.purpose: Hover and active color changes in shared navigation.

motion.name: gift-open
motion.purpose: Opens the Gift Box lid with a strong release.

motion.name: confetti-burst
motion.purpose: Moves confetti from the box into suspended celebration.

motion.name: confetti-drift
motion.purpose: Adds subtle suspended movement after the burst.

components.name: Experiment Navigation
components.description: A familiar single-row site header aligned to the same page gutter as every content section.
components.html:
Animation Playground
Gift BoxScroll Cards
components.css: .ds-header { display:flex; min-height:72px; align-items:center; justify-content:flex-start; gap:48px; padding:0 clamp(20px,7vw,112px); background:#172126; color:#fffaf2; font-family:Inter,ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-header a { color:inherit; text-decoration:none; } .ds-brand { display:inline-flex; min-height:44px; align-items:center; gap:12px; font-size:.9375rem; font-weight:850; } .ds-mark { width:24px; height:24px; border-radius:50%; background:#e6426f; box-shadow:12px 8px 0 -3px #43b7a9,-7px 10px 0 -4px #ffc43d; } .ds-header nav { display:flex; min-height:72px; align-items:center; gap:16px; } .ds-nav-link { position:relative; display:inline-flex; min-height:44px; align-items:center; padding:0 8px; color:oklch(78% .02 82); font-size:.875rem; font-weight:700; transition:color 180ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1); } .ds-nav-link::after { position:absolute; inset:auto 8px 0; height:3px; border-radius:3px 3px 0 0; background:#f08b44; content:''; opacity:0; transform:scaleX(.55); transition:opacity 180ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover,.ds-nav-link-active { color:#fffaf2; } .ds-nav-link-active::after { opacity:1; transform:scaleX(1); } .ds-header a:focus-visible { border-radius:4px; outline:3px solid #ffc43d; outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Motion Stage
components.description: An edge-to-edge viewport that gives one motion experiment a committed color field.
components.html:
Browser motion study

Scroll Card Gallery

One motion contract, explored through two browser animation systems.
components.css: .ds-motion-stage { display:grid; min-height:520px; place-items:end start; padding:72px; color:#fffaf2; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#315e68 0%,#987245 48%,#913f4e 100%); font-family:Inter,ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-motion-stage div { max-width:48rem; } .ds-motion-stage h2 { max-width:11ch; margin:0; font-size:clamp(3.5rem,10vw,8.5rem); line-height:.92; } .ds-motion-stage p:last-child { max-width:42rem; font-size:1.2rem; line-height:1.55; } .ds-kicker { margin:0 0 16px; font-size:.75rem; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:.12em; text-transform:uppercase; }

components.name: Confetti Accent Set
components.description: Four compact geometric shapes that concentrate the loudest palette colors.
components.css: .ds-confetti-set { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:20px; padding:32px; background:#fffaf2; } .ds-confetti-set span { display:block; width:24px; height:24px; } .ds-ribbon { border-radius:999px; background:#e6426f; transform:rotate(-24deg); } .ds-dot { border-radius:50%; background:#2aa5b8; } .ds-shard { clip-path:polygon(50% 0,100% 100%,0 74%); background:#ffc43d; transform:rotate(18deg); } .ds-plus { border-radius:4px; background:linear-gradient(#fffaf2 0 0) center / 34% 100% no-repeat,linear-gradient(#fffaf2 0 0) center / 100% 34% no-repeat,#6d5dfc; transform:rotate(12deg); }

narrative.overview:
Animation Playground feels like a working studio where designers and frontend developers test bold motion ideas at full scale. The system is cheerful, confident, and loud: large type, decisive full-viewport compositions, saturated color, and generous spatial pacing give every experiment a clear stage.

The surrounding interface is intentionally direct. Navigation and explanatory copy use familiar structures so the animation can be strange without the experience becoming confusing. Muted corporate styling, generic SaaS landing pages, and dashboard-like interfaces are explicitly rejected.
keyCharacteristics: Full-palette color with warm orange and teal as recurring anchors.
Oversized sans-serif typography with tight, assertive line-height.
One dominant motion idea per viewport.
Flat structural surfaces with depth reserved for illustrated objects.
Clear semantic navigation, strong focus states, and reduced-motion support.

rules.name: The Experiment Leads Rule
rules.body: Interface chrome must frame the motion experiment, never compete with it.

rules.name: The Full-Volume Rule
rules.body: Use the palette decisively. A vibrant hue must carry a meaningful surface, object, or state rather than appearing as timid decoration.

rules.name: The Anchor-and-Burst Rule
rules.body: Orange and teal establish the composition. Pink, cyan, yellow, and violet appear in compact bursts, never as an evenly distributed rainbow.

rules.name: The Contrast Rule
rules.body: Every text and interactive pairing must meet WCAG AA. Loud color never excuses weak readability.

rules.name: The Scale Does the Talking Rule
rules.body: Do not add decorative type treatments. Establish hierarchy through size, weight, width, and spacing.

rules.name: The Rare Kicker Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracked labels are reserved for genuine metadata such as “Browser motion study,” not repeated above every heading.

rules.name: The Illustrated Depth Rule
rules.body: Never apply ambient card shadows to navigation, text panels, or content sections. Shadows describe physical motion, not generic importance.

dos: Do let each motion experiment be the main event.
Do use Gift Orange and Ribbon Teal as structural anchors, then deploy the other accents in concentrated bursts.
Do use full-viewport color fields and large type to create confident pacing.
Do preserve semantic landmarks, aria-current, visible keyboard focus, and reduced-motion behavior.
Do maximize Lighthouse accessibility, performance, best-practices, and SEO scores.
Do keep content copy within 65 characters or approximately 42rem.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS landing pages as a visual reference.
Don't make the experience resemble dashboard-like interfaces.
Don't distribute every bright color evenly across every screen; that turns energy into noise.
Don't put content inside generic rounded cards when a full-stage composition communicates the idea.
Don't use ambient shadows on structural interface surfaces.
Don't use gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, colored side-stripe borders, or repeated tiny uppercase kickers.
Don't add motion that ignores prefers-reduced-motion.
